steps.title: Use the scatterplot directly
steps.content: This question asks for the plotted power output when the wind speed is $8$ m/s. Since there is a dot at that wind speed, no regression or line of best fit is needed.

steps.title: Read the point
steps.content: Locate $8$ on the horizontal wind-speed axis and move up to the plotted dot. The dot is a little above the $600$ gridline and closest to $640$ watts, so the point is approximately $(8,640)$.

steps.title: Check the choices
steps.content: The choices are $640$, $800$, $840$, and $900$. The graph read is closest to $640$, so choice A is correct.
